title: What It Actually Looks Like to Put Sin to Death
caption:
"Put to death, therefore, whatever belongs to your earthly nature." — Colossians 3:5

Not manage. Not reduce. Not work on. Kill it.

The man who says he's "struggling" has made peace with the battle. The man who's actually killing sin gets specific — what it is, when it hits, who knows about it, and what he stops feeding.

Confession to a brother isn't optional here. James 5:16 is the mechanism, not a suggestion. What you keep in the dark keeps hold of you. What you bring into the light starts to die.

The war isn't one conversation. But the war starts with one honest one.

Save this and send it to the man you've been meaning to call.

#faith #sin #christianmen #discipline #godlymen #manofgod #scripture #james5 #colossians3 #christianity
